body.text: WHEREAS, P31 Labs, Inc. is a Georgia domestic nonprofit corporation (EIN 42-1888158) incorporated on April 3, 2026 under O.C.G.A. Title 14, Chapter 3; and
WHEREAS, the Sole Incorporator has called this initial meeting of the Board of Directors to ratify organizational actions and establish operational governance; and
WHEREAS, the Board has reviewed and accepted the mission of P31 Labs, Inc. to develop open-source assistive technology for neurodivergent individuals;
NOW, THEREFORE, BE IT RESOLVED, that the Articles of Incorporation filed with the Georgia Secretary of State on April 3, 2026 are hereby ratified and affirmed;
FURTHER RESOLVED, that the Board hereby adopts the Bylaws of P31 Labs, Inc. as presented, to take effect immediately;
FURTHER RESOLVED, that William R. Johnson is elected to serve as President, Treasurer, and Registered Agent until the first annual meeting;
FURTHER RESOLVED, that the Board authorizes the filing of IRS Form 1023-EZ to obtain 501(c)(3) recognition, and authorizes the President to execute all documents necessary for the filing;
FURTHER RESOLVED, that the Board authorizes the opening of a business checking account at an FDIC-insured institution, with the President designated as sole signatory until further resolution;

FURTHER RESOLVED, that the Board adopts a conflict-of-interest policy consistent with IRS 1023-EZ requirements, and directs the President to maintain signed acknowledgements of said policy from each director and officer annually;

FURTHER RESOLVED, that all prior actions taken by the Sole Incorporator on behalf of P31 Labs, Inc. — including the filing of Articles of Incorporation, the application for the Employer Identification Number, and the domain registrations for p31ca.org and phosphorus31.org — are hereby ratified and affirmed as acts of the corporation.
